description: CompositionRoyal blue kurti with light blue pin stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with blue and white printed yoke that has a zari border, short sleeves and slits on the sidesFittingRegularWash careWash separately as colour may bleedDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis aurelia kurta speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The handcrafted fabric will keep you going great throughout the day, while the classy design will make you the talk of the town. Pair it with leggings or jeans and flats for an ultra femme look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
